problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE guarantee references port names as both left and right hand side of equality, which is invalid syntax
problems.minimal_edit: Replace each port name with a fresh AGREE variable name and add an assign statement to relate the variable to the port

executor_steps: In the AGREE annex, replace each guarantee with a const declaration for a new variable name
In the AGREE annex, add an assign statement for each variable to the corresponding port
Update the guarantee statements to reference the new variables instead of the ports
